testimonials.text: ANK Hydro drilled our borehole and the water yield exceeded expectations. Professional team and great follow-up support.
The hybrid solar system has completely changed our electricity situation. No more blackouts and our bills have dropped significantly.
They installed a solar-powered pump and set up drip irrigation. Our water costs dropped to zero and crop yield has improved.

team.name: Technical Director
team.bio: Leading our technical team with years of experience in solar installation and borehole drilling.

team.name: Operations Manager
team.bio: Ensuring every project is delivered on time, on budget, and to the highest quality.

team.name: Field Engineers
team.bio: Certified technicians handling installations, testing, and after-sales support.

faq.question: How much does it cost to drill a borehole in Kenya?
faq.answer: Costs vary depending on depth, geological conditions, and location. Contact us for a free assessment and quote.

faq.question: What does the Hybrid Domestic Solar Package include?
faq.answer: 5.12 kWh battery, 550W panels, 3000ES kW inverter, DC disconnect, changeover switch. Call us for current pricing.

faq.question: Do you offer after-sales support?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide 24/7 availability for breakdowns, servicing, and maintenance.
